title: Marketplace Manager - Grofers Advisory Limited - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Grofers Advisory Limited - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Grofers Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Surat-based team.

About Grofers Advisory Limited:
Grofers Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers Advisory Limited!
